response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product work, React with AWS and MongoDB at Optilyz, and current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq — a rare and explicitly required skill. A strong testing and software-craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality expectations of the role. Gaps are mostly tooling-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Jest/Playwright, or Kotlin/Python experience, and much of his frontend history is Ember rather than React, but these are learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range.
strengths: Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — directly matches a required skill few candidates have
Deep TypeScript/Node.js full-stack experience with React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes across recent roles
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, authored test libraries, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and testing tool experience does not mention Vitest, Jest, or Playwright specifically
Kotlin and Python absent; Java exposure is limited and dated, weakening coverage of the secondary backend stack
Frontend depth historically in Ember.js and niche D-lang work; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
